member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IAggregateRoot
member.summary: Marks an entity as an aggregate root in the domain model.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Represents a business event raised by an aggregate.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IDomainEvent.OccurredOnUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC date when the event occurred.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IEntity
member.summary: Defines the minimum contract for a domain entity with a stable identity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IEntity.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the entity.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.Permission
member.summary: Permission granted to roles and resolved dynamically as policies.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.Permission.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.Permission.Code
member.summary: Gets the unique permission code.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.Permission.Type
member.summary: Gets the permission type.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.RolePermission
member.summary: Permission assignment for an authentication role.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.RolePermission.RoleId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ASP.NET Core Identity role identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.RolePermission.PermissionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the permission identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Authorization.RolePermission.Permission
member.summary: Gets or sets the permission granted to the Identity role.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AggregateRoot
member.summary: Base aggregate root for consistency boundaries.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity
member.summary: Entity with auditing metadata and soft-delete state.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the user that created the entity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.CreatedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC creation date.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.ModifiedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the user that last modified the entity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.ModifiedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC modification date.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.DeletedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the user that deleted the entity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.DeletedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC deletion date.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.AuditableEntity.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the entity is soft deleted.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base entity that stores identity and domain events.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.DomainEvents
member.summary: Gets domain events raised by the entity.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.AddDomainEvent(EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Abstractions.IDomainEvent)
member.summary: Adds a domain event to be dispatched after persistence succeeds.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.ClearDomainEvents
member.summary: Clears domain events after dispatching.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Enums.Gender
member.summary: Represents optional gender metadata.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Enums.PermissionType
member.summary: Represents permission categories for authorization policies.

member.summary: Represents the lifecycle status of a domain record.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Enums.UserType
member.summary: Represents supported user source types.

member.summary: Gets the user identifier.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the user identifier.

member.summary: User aggregate root that encapsulates identity profile business rules.

member.summary: Gets the email value object.

member.summary: Gets the mobile number value object.

member.summary: Gets the full name value object.

member.summary: Gets the user type.

member.summary: Gets the user status.

member.summary: Creates a new user aggregate.

member.summary: Updates user profile information.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Users.ApplicationUser.Activate
member.summary: Activates the user when not already active.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Domain.Users.ApplicationUser.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates the user when active.

member.summary: Immutable email value object with domain validation.

member.summary: Gets the normalized email value.

member.summary: Creates a valid email value object.

member.summary: Immutable full-name value object.

member.summary: Gets the first name.

member.summary: Gets the last name.

member.summary: Gets the display name.

member.summary: Creates a valid full name value object.

member.summary: Immutable mobile number value object stored in normalized international form when provided.

member.summary: Gets the normalized mobile number.
